activeAgentSwitchTitle: Click to switch back to assistant
agentSelected: Agent '{name}' selected. Messages now go to {name}.
agentSelectedPending: Agent '{name}' selected (will activate on first message).

allAgentsInConversation: All agents are already in this conversation
atLeastOneAgentRequired: At least one agent is required.
audioNoToken: Audio source is available but no capability token was returned.

authorizeInRelayBrowser: Authorize in the browser that opens on the relay...
broadcastFirst: Start a conversation first before broadcasting.
bugAgentRequired: BUG: agent name required for select
bugNoAgentSelected: BUG: no agent selected (selectedAgent is empty)
ccInteractiveTerminalDesc: Attach to the selected agent tmux

commandShort.1: Show available commands or detailed help for a command
commandShort.11: List all resources (agents, skills, MCP servers)
commandShort.12: Activate a resource for this conversation
commandShort.13: Deactivate a resource from this conversation
commandShort.14: Share a resource to another conversation
commandShort.15: Login to Claude Code via server (noVNC)
commandShort.16: Login to Claude Code via relay
commandShort.18: Open a terminal tab on a relay
commandShort.19: Open VS Code (code-server) tab on a relay
commandShort.2: Send a message to an agent or a running task
commandShort.21: Open virtual desktop (VNC) on a relay
commandShort.22: Forward a port from a relay to the web server
commandShort.23: Manage relay bindings for this conversation
commandShort.26: Change LLM service for an agent in this conversation
commandShort.27: Interrupt an agent — asks it to respond immediately
commandShort.28: Force stop an agent — immediate cancel, no response
commandShort.29: Restart context from last N messages (default 5, 0 = empty)
commandShort.3: Side-channel question to an agent (shortcut for /agent btw)
commandShort.30: Summarize context to N tokens and restart from summary
commandShort.31: Tell an agent to continue from where it stopped
commandShort.33: Rebuild context from full conversation history
commandShort.42: Knowledge Graph — view, add and invalidate triples
commandShort.51: Preview a file (image, PDF, text, code)
commandShort.52: Show token usage and estimated cost per agent
commandShort.53: Auto-conversation — agents contribute to the conversation autonomously
commandShort.6: Create, assign and manage agent tasks
commandShort.77: Run a prompt on a recurring interval
confirmDelete: Delete this conversation? This cannot be undone.
contextAddSharedRequired: Switch to Shared or an agent context before adding context messages.
adminScopeViewHint: Show resources for all users and conversations (admin)
contextDeleteContextConfirm: Delete the entire "{name}" context? This cannot be undone.
contextInvalidateRuntimeConfirm: Invalidate runtime session "{name}"? This will force a fresh session next turn.
contextMessageNotFoundRefresh: Message not found - refresh the context
contextOpBusy: A context operation is in progress, please wait...
contextTranscriptReplaceBlocked: Transcript cannot be replaced from the context editor.
continueFromLast: Continue from where you left off.
deleteBranchConfirm: Delete branch "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
deleteVoiceConfirm:
Delete voice clone "{name}"?

This cascade-deletes:
  • the provider voice_id (if paradigm A)
  • the reference audio
  • every cached TTS rendering
clearFileStoreConfirm: Delete all FileStore files for this conversation?
desktopNoUrl: Desktop ready but server did not return a URL
desktopStopUsage: No active desktop to stop. Usage: /desktop stop [relay_id]
desktopTabClosed: Desktop tab closed (desktop still running). Use /desktop stop to shut down.
fileUploadUnavailable: File upload not available. Drag & drop files into the chat.
flowSelectOneShotTrigger: Select at least one one-shot trigger.
flowRequiresConversationContext: This flow requires a conversation context.
flowRequiresUserContext: This flow requires a user context.
folderUnsupported: Your browser does not support the File System Access API (use Chrome or Edge)
groupTechnicalDisabledTitle: Group technical details. Click to group tool calls and thinking in collapsible boxes, then reload the conversation.
groupTechnicalEnabledTitle: Technical details are grouped. Click to disable grouping and reload the conversation.
helpCallHint: Type /help call <toolname> for detailed parameter info.
installToolInstructions:
To install a tool, drag & drop a .py file into the chat or paste the code with:
/install filename.py
```python
# your code here
```

invalidateTripleConfirm: Invalidate this triple? It will be marked as ended.
kgRequired: Subject, predicate and object are required.
missingCredentialsJson: Missing credentials JSON. Paste the content of .credentials.json
name: Name
needTwoBranchesToCompare: Need at least 2 branches to compare.

noAgentsDefinedUsage: No agents defined. Use /agent create to add one.
noBranchesToDelete: No branches to delete (only current branch exists).
noConfigurableParametersForServiceType: No configurable parameters for this service type.
noConversationsHint: No conversations yet. Click + New to start.

noRelaysAvailableConnectFirst: No relays available. Connect a relay first (PawCode or VS Code extension).
noRemoteFilesystemsAvailable: No filesystem services available to link
noResourcesDefinedUsage: No resources defined. Use /agent create, /add-skill, etc.
noResourcesHint: No resources. Use [+] or /agent create, /task create
noScheduledRechecks: No scheduled rechecks for this conversation.
noServicesInstalledUsage: No services installed. Use /service install <type> <name> [key=val,...] to add one.
noSkillsAvailableCreateHint: No skills available. Create skills via /skill or manage_resource.

noTaskDefinitionsOrRunning: No task definitions or running tasks.
noVoices: No voice clones. Use clone_voice to register one.

Parse error: {error}

placeholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
planTitleAndStepRequired: Title and at least one step are required.
projectGraphEmptyBuildHint: No project graph built yet. Click Build to index the codebase.
projectGraphMissingUseBuild: No project graph built yet. Use /graph build first.
rebuiltClean: Context set to full conversation: {messages} messages, ~{tokens} tokens.
relayBrowserAuthorizeHint: A browser window should open on the relay machine. Authorize there.
removeLastAgentConfirm: Remove the last agent from this conversation?
restartFromHereConfirm: Restart the conversation from this message? Messages after it and all agent contexts will be deleted.
restartEmpty: Context cleared — fresh start (system prompt only).
resumed: Conversation summarized ({n} messages → {len} chars). Next message starts from the summary.
rewindFilesRiskWarning: Risky: will attempt to restore files modified by agents on the relay. May fail if files were changed externally.

selectDefinitionAddAgents: Select a definition to add agents
sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
skillImportNoPaths: No SKILL.md file found under this path.

skillReviewFinalWord: You have the final word. Review the findings above and decide.

vmListHint: Use `/vm kill <id>` to stop a container.
vmUsage:
Usage: /vm <list|kill|killall> [container_id]
  /vm list              — List all PawFlow Docker containers
  /vm kill <id>         — Kill a specific container
  /vm killall           — Kill all PawFlow containers
watchUnavailableWeb: /watch is not available in the web UI. Use the CLI for file watching.
welcome: Welcome! Type a message to start chatting.
pfpPathRequired: Package path or registry ref is required.
pfpRegistryUntrustedWarning: Registry not marked trusted. Inspect provenance and pin SHA before installing.
pfpUninstallHelp: Regular uninstall refuses to remove packages that other packages depend on. Force removes it anyway.
setPassphrasePrompt: Set a passphrase (no recovery — if you lose it the data is unrecoverable):
noRecoveryWarning: No recovery: if you lose this passphrase the data is unrecoverable.
confirmDisableEncryption: Disable encryption and decrypt this conversation back to clear text?
unlockBeforeDisable: Unlock the conversation before disabling encryption.
lockedBannerText: This conversation is encrypted. Enter the passphrase to view its history.
setRecoveryPrompt: Set a recovery passphrase (store it somewhere safe — it can unlock this conversation if you lose the primary passphrase):

voiceSettingsHint: Edit models/voices in the Services panel.
usageCostBadgeTitle: Conversation cost {usd} — {tin} in / {tout} out tokens. Click for details.
usageCostTotalsLine: {calls} calls — {tin} in / {tout} out tokens (cache read {cr}, write {cw})
usageCostVirtualLine: virtual — what this would have cost via API (subscription services)
